title: lycium floribundum var. elongatum
intro: Lycium floribundum var. elongatum, also known as the desert elder or Chinese boxthorn, is a plant species that belongs to the nightshade family and is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Lycium floribundum var. elongatum include reducing the risk of age-related macular degeneration and improving overall well-being, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and traditional remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant often include dried extracts, teas, and capsules, which can be used to support eye health and promote overall wellness.
